landing.badge: Moagi wa bofelo wa photefolio wa batlhabolodi
landing.subtitle: Sengwe le sengwe se o se tlhokang go bontsha bokgoni jwa gago, diporojeke le maitemogelo a gago.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Re tlamela ka didirisiwa tsotlhe tse o di tlhokang go tlhagelela mo boidiiding le go bona tiro ya gago ya ditoro.
landing.feature1Desc: Rulaganya dikarolo tsa gago, diporojeke, le bokgoni jwa gago bonolo fela ka motseleganyi wa rona wa pono o o tlhaloganyesegang.
landing.feature2Desc: Tlhopha mo dithempoleiteng tse di tlhamilweng ka botswerere kgotsa itirele tebego e e kgethegileng.
landing.feature3Desc: Latedisa baeng ba gago, bona gore ke diporojeke dife tse di tlhokomelwang thata, le tse dingwe.

auth.loginToContinue: Tsena mo akhaontong ya gago go tswelela
auth.joinCommunity: Kopanela le diketekete tsa batlhabolodi ba bangwe

auth.hasAccount: A o setse o na le akhaonto?

topProjects.desc: Tiragatso ya tiro ya gago mo matlhong a baeng.

minimalist.name: Bonnye
minimalist.desc: Moakanyetso o o phepa le o o bonolo o o tsepamisitseng mogopolo mo diteng.

developerDark.name: Motlhabolodi Lefifi
developerDark.desc: Setlhogo se se lefifi se siametse go bontsha khoutu le ditlhopha tsa thekenoloji.

creative.name: Boitlhamedi
creative.desc: Thulaganyo e e matlhagatlhaga le e e mebalabala ya batlhami le batlhami.

executive.name: Khuduthamaga
executive.desc: Thulaganyo ya seporofešenale le ya semmuso ya baitseanape ba kgwebo.

bentoGrid.name: Keriti ya Bento
bentoGrid.desc: Thulaganyo ya keriti ya mofuta wa Apple ya segompieno e e tlhagisang bokgoni jo bo farologaneng ka katlego.

neoBrutalism.name: Bosetlhogo jo bosha
neoBrutalism.desc: Melelwane e e bogale le mebala e e farologaneng e e kwa godimo ya go lebega e le mo fesheneng, e sa kopa maitshwarelo.

glassmorphism.name: Sebopego sa galase
glassmorphism.desc: Ditlamorago tsa galase e e serame mo godimo ga di-gradient tse di mebalabala tsa UI ya segompieno e e borethe.

linkInBio.name: Kgokagano mo Bio
linkInBio.desc: Thulaganyo e e kopaneng e e tsepameng e e tokafaditsweng ya diskrini tsa selulafouno le media wa botsalano.

feedback.title: Romela Pegelo
feedback.subtitle: Re thuse go e dira botoka ka go re naya dikakantsho, go tshwayatshwaya diphoso, kgotsa go bega diphoso mo tirisong eno.

profile.emailHelp: Imeile e dirisiwa go tsena mme ga e bontshiwe phatlalatsa.
profile.oauthNotice: Porofaele eno e golagantswe le akhaonto ya gago ya {{motlamedi}}. Diphetogo tsa porofaele di tshwanetse go dirwa ka motlamedi wa tirelo.

security.twoFactorDesc: Sireletsa akhaonto ya gago o dirisa khoutu ya tlaleletso ya OTP.
security.activeSessionsDesc: Ka metlha letla go bayaleitlho didiriswa tse di tseneng.
security.hideFromSearch: Fitlha Photefolio mo Dienjini tsa Patlo
security.hideFromSearchDesc: Thibela Google go tsenya ditshupane tsa tsebe ya gago ya photefolio ya botlhe.

disable2fa.title: Thibela 2FA
disable2fa.description: A o tlhomamisegile gore o batla go tima netefatso ya mabaka a mabedi?
disable2fa.confirmPasswordLabel: Tsenya nomoro ya gago ya sephiri go tlhomamisa
disable2fa.currentPasswordPlaceholder: Lefoko la sephiri la ga jaana
disable2fa.incorrectPassword: Nomoro ya sephiri e e sa siamang.

setup2fa.step1Desc: Bula app ya gago ya netefatso o bo o sekaseka khoutu e e latelang ya QR:
setup2fa.unableToScan: Ga o kgone go sekaseka? Dirisa senotlolo sa go rulaganya
setup2fa.step2Desc: Tsenya khoutu ya dinomoro di le 6 e e tlhamilweng ke tiriswa ya gago:
setup2fa.invalidLength: Tsweetswee tsenya khoutu ya dinomoro di le 6.
setup2fa.invalidCode: Khoutu ya netefatso e e sa direng. Tsweetswee leka gape.

about.title: Ka ga Tiriso
about.subtitle: Polatefomo ya Moagi wa Photefolio
about.description: DevFolio ke sethala sa segompieno sa moagi wa photefolio se se diretsweng batlhabolodi, batlhami, le batlhami ba seporofešenale.

deleteAccount.title: Phimola Akhaonto Ruri
deleteAccount.successMessage: Go rometswe imeile ya netefatso ya go phimolwa ga akhaonto.
deleteAccount.errorMessage: E paletswe ke go romela imeile ya netefatso.
deleteAccount.confirmationMessage: A o tlhomamisegile gore o batla go phimolela akhaonto ya gago ruri?
deleteAccount.warningMessage1: O tla amogela imeile go tlhomamisa gore akhaonto e phimotswe.
deleteAccount.warningMessage2: Fa e netefaditswe, tshedimosetso yotlhe (photefolio, diporojeke, dipalopalo) e tla phimolelwa ruri mme ga e ka ke ya busediwa.

toasts.toastSetup2FAFailed: E paletswe ke go rulaganya 2FA. Tsweetswee leka gape.
toasts.toast2FAEnabled: Netefatso ya mabaka a mabedi e kgontshitswe.
toasts.toast2FADisabled: Netefatso ya mabaka a mabedi e thibetswe.
toasts.toastSessionEnabled: Go ela tlhoko nako e e matlhagatlhaga go kgontshitswe.
toasts.toastSessionDisabled: Go bayaleitlho ga nako e e dirang go thibetswe.
toasts.toastSetupKeyCopied: Senotlolo sa go rulaganya se kopisitswe mo peeletsomaneng.

privacy.title: Pholisi ya Bosephiri
privacy.intro: Pholisi eno ya Polokodiphiri e tlhalosa kafa DevFolio e kokoanyang, e dirisang, le go sireletsa tshedimosetso ya gago ka gone fa o dirisa ditirelo tsa rona.
privacy.section1Content: Re kokoanya tshedimosetso e o e nayang ka tlhamalalo fa o tlhama akhaonto, o aga photefolio, le go ikgolaganya le tshegetso ya rona.
privacy.section2Content: Tshedimosetso ya gago e dirisiwa go dira, go tlhokomela, le go tlamela ka dikarolo tsa ditirelo tsa rona, mmogo le go buisana le wena malebana le akhaonto ya gago kgotsa ditirelo.
privacy.section3Content: Re dirisa dikgato tse di utlwalang tsa tshireletso go sireletsa tshedimosetso ya gago gore e se ka ya fitlhelelwa, ya senolwa kgotsa ya senngwa ke batho ba ba sa letlelelweng.

confirmDeleteAccount.missingToken: Letshwao la netefatso ga le a bonwa.
confirmDeleteAccount.defaultError: E paletswe ke go phimola akhaonto. Letshwao le ka tswa le feletswe ke nako.
confirmDeleteAccount.loadingMessage: Tsweetswee ema pele, re dira kopo ya gago.
confirmDeleteAccount.successMessage: Tshedimosetso yotlhe ya gago e phimotswe ruri. O tla kaelwa gape...
confirmDeleteAccount.errorTitle: E paletswe ke go Phimola Akhaonto

forgotPassword.otpSentToEmail: Khoutu ya OTP e rometswe kwa imeileng ya gago.
forgotPassword.emailThirdParty: Imeile eno e kwadisitswe ka motho yo mongwe.
forgotPassword.genericError: Go na le phoso. Tsweetswee leka gape.
forgotPassword.otpVerified: Khoutu ya OTP e netefaditswe ka katlego.
forgotPassword.otpExpired: Khoutu ya OTP e feletswe ke nako. Tsweetswee kopa khoutu e ntšhwa.
forgotPassword.otpInvalid: Khoutu ya OTP e e sa direng.
forgotPassword.otpResent: Khoutu e ntšhwa ya OTP e rometswe kwa imeileng ya gago.
forgotPassword.otpResendFailed: E paletswe ke go romela gape khoutu ya OTP. Tsweetswee leka gape.
forgotPassword.passwordResetSuccess: Nomoro ya sephiri e setilwe sešwa ka katlego. Tsweetswee tsena ka nomoro ya gago ya sephiri e ntšhwa.
forgotPassword.passwordResetFailed: E paletswe ke go seta sešwa nomoro ya sephiri.
forgotPassword.title: Lebetse Nomoro ya Sephiri
forgotPassword.description: Tsenya aterese ya imeile e e kwadisitsweng mo akhaontong ya gago. Re tla romela khoutu ya OTP go seta sešwa nomoro ya sephiri.
forgotPassword.verifyOtpDesc: Tsenya khoutu ya dinomoro di le 6 e e rometsweng kwa imeileng ya gago go tlhomamisa gore o mang.
forgotPassword.newPasswordTitle: Tlhama Nomoro ya Sephiri e Ntšhwa
forgotPassword.newPasswordDesc: Tlhama nomoro ya sephiri e ntšha, e e nonofileng go sireletsa akhaonto ya gago.
forgotPassword.resettingPassword: Go seta gape Nomoro ya sephiri...

verifyEmail.resendError: E paletswe ke go romela gape imeile ya netefatso. Tsweetswee leka gape.
verifyEmail.title: Tlhola Imeile ya Gago
verifyEmail.description: Re rometse imeile ya netefatso kwa atereseng ya gago ya imeile. Tsweetswee bula imeile o bo o tobetsa konopo ya <1>"Netefatsa Akhaonto"</1> go dira gore akhaonto ya gago e dire.
verifyEmail.step1: Bula tiriso ya gago ya imeile (Gmail, Yahoo, jj)
verifyEmail.step2: Batla imeile go tswa go DevFolio e e nang le setlhogo se se reng "Go Tsenya Akhaonto mo Tirong"
verifyEmail.step3: Tobetsa konopo ya "Tlhomamisa Akhaonto" mo imeileng
verifyEmail.step4: O tla lebisiwa kwa tsebeng ya go tsena go tsena
verifyEmail.resendSuccess: Imeile ya netefatso e rometswe gape!
verifyEmail.backToLogin: Boela kwa Tsebeng ya go Tsena
verifyEmail.footerNote: A ga o a amogela imeile? Tlhola setsholadifaele sa <1>Sepamo</1> kgotsa <2>Matlakala</2> mo imeileng ya gago. Kgokagano ya netefatso e dira mo diureng di le <3>24</3>.
